summary: Iteration 47 - Earnings Calendar Enhanced Features fully tested and verified. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly: gradient columns by density, expected move (% and $), earnings score badges (A+/A/B+/B/C/D/F/N/A), Proj vs Result labels, EPS surprise % for reported items, heat legend, week navigation, and ticker click.

details.location: Top of widget, below week navigation

details.color: Matches column heat color (e.g., text-red-400 for heavy)

details.shows: Stock analysis tabs (Overview, Chart, Technicals, Fundamentals, Earnings, Strategies, News)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend API returns all required fields: has_reported, expected_move.percent, expected_move.dollar, earnings_score.label, earnings_score.type, eps_surprise.percent
Frontend correctly renders all data with appropriate colors and formatting
Score type correctly aligns with has_reported flag (actual vs projected)
Heat colors scale relative to max count within displayed week

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

mocked_apis.note: Real Finnhub API data used. Expected move values are simulated per-symbol (seeded by symbol+date for consistency)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Earnings Calendar widget enhanced features all working. Key UI locations: Right sidebar, collapsible widget with data-testid='earnings-widget'. To see reported earnings with Result labels and EPS surprise, navigate to -1 Week (previous week). Current week shows mix of Proj and Result. API endpoint /api/earnings/calendar returns all enhanced fields. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_earnings_calendar_enhanced.py
